title: Harness Step Approval
description: User approval record for a pipeline gate. Lives at .harness/{slug}/.approvals/step-{N}.json. Presence + valid content is the only source of truth for gate-passed state; resume scanning re-asks otherwise.

step.description: Pipeline step the approval refers to. Only Clarify (1) and Plan (3) have user gates.

approved_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp the user's approval was recorded.

feedback.description: Free-form user feedback captured at approval time. Null if user approved without comment.

artifact_checksum.description: SHA-256 hash of the artifact being approved (01-clarify.md for step 1, concatenated 03-plan/*.yaml for step 3). Used by 'harness stale' to detect edits after approval.
